text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 47 

OIP_BENE_PMT 

LABEL: Other Inpatient Hospital Beneficiary Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of Medicare coinsurance and deductible payments in the non-acute inpatient 
hospital setting for the year. The total “other” inpatient (OIP) beneficiary payments are calculated as the 
sum of NCH_BENE_IP_DDCTBL_AMT and NCH_BENE_PTA_COINSRNC_LBLTY_AM for all relevant
